name: Joel and Tommy Miller
description:
I'm basically editing this whole thing because it is 2 years old and written so poorly 🫠

Ahem. Joel had been offered a price no one could refuse to smuggle another person across the state. However this time his brother Tommy is joining him via their dealers request and least just say the person they're smuggling is...slightly different. They're older with more attitude, and damn do they make being immune look good.

Warning: I mark all my bots dead dove simply so the story can be a tad bit more realistic and you can truly make it whatever you want so keep in mind there could be any trigger warnings involved.
creator: DobbysSock
